content: If you delete any items from the list, their corresponding files will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone. To delete all the files use the link:

comment.text: This translation key is used for a warning message that alerts users about the irreversible nature of deleting items from a backup list. The text appears in a dialog box when the user attempts to delete files and cannot be undone, prompting them to use an alternative method instead.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Bulgarian translation changes 'any items' (subset) to 'all items' (entirety), which alters the logic of the warning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ако изтриете някой от елементите от списъка, съответните им файлове също ще бъдат изтрити. Това действие не може да бъде отменено. За да изтриете всички файлове, използвайте връзката:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence 'Dieser Vorgang nicht rückgängig gemacht werden kann' is grammatically broken and conveys a fragmented meaning. It lacks the auxiliary verb 'kann' in the correct position, making it a non-sentence.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Falls Sie Elemente aus der Liste löschen, werden auch die entsprechenden Dateien gelöscht. Dieser Vorgang kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden. Um alle Dateien zu löschen, verwenden Sie den Link:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with ":" but translation ends with "."
The Italian translation changes the meaning from 'deleting ANY items' to 'deleting ALL items' (Se si eliminano TUTTI gli elementi), which alters the scope of the warning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Se si eliminano elementi dall'elenco, i relativi file verranno eliminati. Questa azione non può essere annullata. Per eliminare tutti i file, utilizzare il collegamento:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation changes the meaning from 'any items' (some/any) to 'all items' (wszystkie), which alters the logic of the warning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jeśli usuniesz jakiekolwiek elementy z listy, odpowiadające im pliki zostaną również usunięte. Ta czynność nie może zostać cofnięta. Aby usunąć wszystkie pliki, użyj linku:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'අථකයක්' (athakayak) is a misspelling or incorrect word choice for 'item'. It appears to be a typo for 'අයිතමයක්' (ayithamayak).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ඔබ ලැයිස්තුවෙන් කිසියම් අයිතමයක් මකා දැමුවහොත්, ඒවාට අදාළ වන ගොනු ද මකා දැමෙනු ඇත. මෙම ක්‍රියාමාර්ගය අප්‍රතිවර්ත්‍යයි. සියළුම ගොනු මැකීමට සබැඳිය යොදා ගන්න:
